aids.title: Gini = 1 minus Sum of Squares
aids.content: Gini = 1 - SUM(p^2). Pure node: one class has p=1, so Gini = 1-1 = 0. Most impure: p=0.5 each, Gini = 1-0.5 = 0.5

aids.title: 20 Questions Game
aids.content: Decision trees are like playing '20 Questions'. Each question (node) splits possibilities. Good questions (high info gain) eliminate many options. Goal: reach answer (leaf) in few questions.

aids.title: Pre vs Post Pruning
aids.content: PRE-pruning: Set limits BEFORE growing (max_depth, min_samples). POST-pruning: Grow full tree, then CUT branches. Pre is faster, Post often better quality.
